chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-99 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of MA No.6584/2015 10-05-2019 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, D.P.G.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. It appears that after filing this Criminal Miscellaneous Application the applicant has lost his interest, hence the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
